name: ♰༒ Httyd ༒♰ PT.3
description:

♰༒ Httyd ༒♰ PT.3

OMG ISTG, when I was just finishing off saying PT.3 for the Bot name and stuff, My name is Tallulah FROM BUGSLY MALONE started playing on my Spotify. For some ppl, you would have done a Yr.6 show for when you leave and stuff, and we did that, and literally all the girls who didn't get Tallulah was crying and everything. 🙏🏻 I remember all of that, because while I was pretending to be worried for everyone, I was laughing my butt off when I got home. ✋🏻

*IF YOU'RE LONELLYY, YOU DON'T HAVE TO BE LONELYYYYYY!*

I had three roles, I'm just too good for this. ✋🏻

But I realised I didn't put #Httyd in the tags for PT.1 💔

♰༒ .... ༒♰
